module.title: Win32 system module
module.description: Various system related checks, such as CPU load, process state, service state memory usage and PDH counters.
module.name: CheckSystem

check_cpu.description: Check that the load of the CPU(s) are within bounds.

commands.check_uptime: Check time since last server re-boot.
commands.check_service: Check the state of one or more of the computer services.
commands.check_process: Check state/metrics of one or more of the processes running on the computer.
commands.check_memory: Check free/used memory on the system.

check_pdh.desc: Check the value of a performance (PDH) counter on the local or remote system.\nThe counters can also be added and polled periodically to get average values. Performance Log Users group membership is required to check performance counters.

commands.check_os_version: Check the version of the underlying OS.
commands.check_pagefile: Check the size of the system pagefile(s).
commands.check_cpu_frequency: Check CPU clock frequency (current vs max) per processor.
commands.check_battery: Check battery status including charge level, power source, and battery health.
commands.check_os_updates: Check for available Windows updates via the Windows Update Agent (WUA) API.
commands.check_process_history: Check the history of processes that have been running since NSClient++ started. Useful for verifying if certain applications have been executed.
commands.check_process_history_new: Check for new processes that appeared within a specified time window. Useful for detecting unexpected or unauthorized applications.
commands.check_registry_key: Check existence, last-write time, and child counts of one or more Windows registry keys.
commands.check_registry_value: Check the type, content, and size of one or more Windows registry values.
